# Spartan Claim Resources LLC
> Licensed public insurance adjusters in Las Vegas & Henderson, Nevada

## About
Spartan Claim Resources is a licensed public adjusting firm advocating exclusively for policyholders in Southern Nevada. We inspect damage, review insurance policies, prepare claims, and negotiate with insurance companies to maximize settlements. Policyholders who hire public adjusters receive 747% higher settlements on average. We charge a flat 12-20% fee — significantly below the industry standard of 25-33%.

## Services
- Commercial Loss & Business Interruption: property damage, equipment loss, business interruption, extra expense claims
- Residential Fire & Water Damage: homeowner claims for fire, smoke, water damage, storm losses
- Automobile Total Loss: vehicle valuation advocacy and fair market value negotiation

## Service Areas
Las Vegas, Henderson, Boulder City, Pahrump, Mesquite, Laughlin, Clark County, Nye County

## Team
- Neil May: Director of Operations / Public Adjuster, IICRC certified
- Kirby Hendry: Chief Public Adjuster, policy language and negotiation specialist
- Taylor Sakamoto: Office Manager, client communications
